meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028
news.summary: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028, the company announced Wednesday morning.

news.headline: We're exiting a troubled stock after a muted quarter, while considering better options
news.summary: The quarter offered some signs that management's turnaround strategy is gaining traction, but progress remains slow.

news.summary: Wall St set to slip as US-Iran tensions cloud start to second half  Reuters

news.summary: Oil falls as markets await outcome of Iran-US talks, US stocks data  Reuters

news.headline: Buy the UK DIP? Defense stocks lifted by $20 billion spending boost as gilts come under fire
news.summary: British defense stocks are marching higher once again after the U.K. confirmed a near-$20 billion military spending boost on Tuesday.

news.headline: Iran warns of immediate response to any threat, cites US commitment to restrain Israel - Reuters
news.summary: Iran warns of immediate response to any threat, cites US commitment to restrain Israel  Reuters

news.headline: Should You Forget Altcoins and Just Buy Bitcoin Instead?
news.summary: The hunt for higher returns than Bitcoin offers has been the demise of many altcoin investors' plans.

news.headline: Battery Theme Splits: Lithium Miners Outperform as Automakers Face EV Margin Squeeze
news.summary: The battery theme splits upstream lithium miners, capturing explosive earnings growth, from downstream automakers facing margin pressure as deep value plays with structural risks.

news.headline: MTUM Investors: Watch Micron’s Weight at the November Reconstitution

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $728.51 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $743.80 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Neutral — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $728.51 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA CALL — enter $16.55–$18.29, target $26.13+, stop $10.45.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.07% and SPY -0.40%. Composite sentiment -11 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), spy trend. VIX at 15.47 (+0.94%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Communication (+3.01%) is leading while Healthcare (-0.58%) lags. Premarket strength in META, PLTR; weakness in AMD, NVDA. The desk's highest-conviction setup is TSLA (6.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
